503.description: The Health Check is not successful

path.description: Request path that caused the error

clientSecret.description: Stripe client secret for frontend confirmation

amount.description: Amount in PLN as Decimal string

amount.description: Amount in PLN as Decimal string

refundedAmount.description: Total refunded amount as Decimal string

stripeRefundId.description: Stripe refund ID if refund was initiated

productId.description: Product ID (null if product was deleted)

productName.description: Product name at time of order

productSku.description: Product SKU at time of order

productImageUrl.description: Product image URL at time of order

unitPrice.description: Price per unit as Decimal string

items.description: Order line items with product snapshots

reason.example: Product arrived damaged, screen has cracks

adminNotes.description: Admin notes visible to customer after review

minimumOrderAmount.description: Minimum order subtotal required to use this coupon

usageCount.description: How many times this coupon has been used

freeShippingThreshold.description: Order subtotal above which shipping is free (null = never free)

estimatedDays.description: Estimated delivery time in business days

isActive.description: Whether this method is available at checkout

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default tax rate

body.example: Your order ORD-20250615-0001 has been confirmed.

referenceId.description: Polymorphic link to related entity (orderId, paymentId, productId)

isRead.description: Whether the user has read this notification

count.description: Number of affected or matching notifications

enabled.description: Whether this channel is enabled for this type (opt-out model: missing = enabled)

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address for its type

cloudinaryPublicId.description: Cloudinary public ID for image management
Cloudinary public ID for image management

images.description: First image only in list view

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

isLowStock.description: Whether available stock is at or below threshold

quantity.description: Quantity of this product in the cart

id.description: Cart CUID (empty string if no cart exists yet)

items.description: Cart items with product info and prices

discountAmount.description: Discount amount from coupon (0 if no coupon)

comment.example: Best headphones I have ever owned.
